System Codes PAGEREF _Toc148568222 \h 35 GLOBAL EXTENSION CONTROL CODE SETU P Enablement System Code Navigate to the System Codes (Configuration) UI. If system code C-000 (Global Extension Control) does not yet exist, click Add. Populate the following information: 232410 174433 Note: The checkbox “System code parameters exist” will auto populate upon completion of subsequent steps for adding parameters, and it is un - editable to the user. Click Save. Next, click the Code ID’s Action Button The System Code ID’s screen is displayed. right 353276 0 0 Click ADD. Populate the following information provided above. Click SAVE to save the Code ID. Next, Click the Parameters Action button located on the bottom right of the screen to Navigate back to System Code Parameters screen. System Code parameters Screen is displayed. Click ADD button. 344805 151933 Populate the following information provided above. Click SAVE. Click on the Parameters tab . 189290 417782 C heck the box to enable all custom functionality. Click SAVE. Add additional custom codes. 138023 631981 Navigate to System Codes UI in WM. We will need to add Custom code C- 000- EX33 if it has not been added. Search for system code C - 000 : Use the Custom Code drop-down option under th e Record Type menu. Type in 000 for Code Type. Click apply to search. Click the Checkbox to select the system code. Click on the Code ID's action button in the lower right of the menu. Click ADD action button. Populate the fields with the information provided in the screenshot above . Click SAVE. C-000-EX33 Enablement Click the Blue Parameters Tab. Located next to the DETAILS tab. Check the box to enable all custom functionality. CLICK SAVE. Add Custom Code C-E33 - SHP Open System Codes UI Click Add. Populate the following information: NOTE: Code Description- *EX33 Shipment search criteria by task type* Click Save. Next, click the Code ID’s Action Button The System Code ID’s screen is displayed. Click ADD. NOTE: Code Description and Code ID description- * EX33 Shipment search criteria by task type * Populate the following information provided above. Click SAVE to save the Code ID. Next, Click the Parameters Action button located on the bottom right of the screen to Navigate back to System Code Parameters screen System Code parameters Screen is displayed. Click ADD button. Populate the following information provided above. Click SAVE. Click on the Parameters tab. Enter numeric value in Value edit box. Click SAVE. B -0 51 - T3 Reason Code Open System Codes UI Search B-051 system code. Select B-051 the n select Code Ids. Add at the bottom right-hand side of the screen. Copy as seen above. Save. Select parameters tab. Change parm 2-2 to record below. Add custom S-590 parameter s Open System Codes UI Search S-590 system code. Select S-590 then select Parameters. Select Add at the bottom right hand side of the screen. Note: Description name is EX33 Label Template enablement Copy as seen above Hit “Save” Select Add at the bottom right hand side of the screen. Copy as seen above Hit “Save” Select Add at the bottom right hand side of the screen. Copy as seen above Hit “Save” Note: Description name is EX33 Shipment search criteria by task type Copy as seen above Hit “Save” Enable sys code 590 param 98-98 for task types requiring continuous cluster CR06 logic Enable sys code 590 param 82 -82 and populate param 83-97 for task types requiring custom l abel t ype configuration for multiple product types CR15 logic Add Custom Code C- P33 -E33 1. Navigate to the System Codes (Configuration) UI. 2 . Click Add. 3. Populate the following information: Note: The checkbox “System code parameters exist” will auto populate upon completion of subsequent steps for adding parameters, and it is un-editable to the user. 4 . Click Save. 5 . Next , click the Code ID’s Action Button 6 . The System Code ID’s screen is displayed. 7 . Click ADD. Populate the following information provided above. 8 . Click SAVE to save the Code ID. 9 . Next , Click the Parameters Action button located on the bottom right of the screen to Navigate back to System Code Parameters screen. 10. System Code parameters Screen is displayed. 11. Click ADD button. 12 . Populate the following information provided above. 13 . Click SAVE. 14 . Click ADD button. 15. Populate the following information provided above. 16. Click Save 1 7 . Click Code Ids button 1 8 . Click on the Parameters tab. 1 9 . Configure Paramet er values 20 . Click Save Add Transaction Parameters EX33 Enablement RF Pack Pick Cart Transaction Navigate to transactions parameters UI, filter for P ackPickCart * Select P a ck Pick Cart transaction and select copy to copy transaction. Copy transaction configuration as seen below. Save. RF Pack Pick Cart Transaction Parameters Open Transaction Parameters UI, search for previously created transaction name . Configure transaction parameters assumed in EX33 extension spec under assumptions section . Note: For local testing purposes label printing was disabled. Note: Parm 22-23 needs to have the following configured in sys code . Click on “EX33 Pack Pick Cart” transaction and click on “Program Template” on the bottom right. Click “Add” Enter in the following information so it looks like the image below. Hit “Save” Add configuration parameters for 517-517, 518-518, 519-519 , 520-520 , 521-521, 522-522, 523-523, 524-524, 525-525, 526-526, 527-527, 530-530 , 5 Hit “Save”. Hit “ Save ” Hit "Save”. Note: Description name is EX33 Zone Picking – Pick and Pass Hit “ Save ” Hit “ Save ” Note: Description name is EX33 Continuous Cluster Logic Hit “Save” Hit “Save” Note: Description name is EX33 Chase oLPN Updates Hit "Save" Note: Description name is EX33 Prevent Master Task Merge Hit "Save" Note: Description name is EX33 Label Print Trigger on XREF scan Hit “Save” Hit “Save” Note: Description name is EX33 Single Tote Continuous Cluster Hit “Save” Note: Description name is EX33 Pick Path Optimization Hit “Save” Hit “Save” Note: Description name is EX33 Reprint Functionality Hit “Save” Note: Description name is EX33 Screen Delay Lag Reduction Hit “Save” Confirm Pack Pick Cart transactions have newly created parameters. Select Edit, check parameters, and save . Please complete configuration for all pack picks cart transactions that require EX33. Add Task Action for Active Picking Task Types Task Action Conf iguration for task Types Navigate to Task Action UI. Select “ Add ” Add below task action for INT50 Task Picking Group Hit “Save”. Repeat process for all task types using custom EX33 RF picking for active transaction . Add User Profile Configuration for Max Tote Number Assignment User Profile Configuration UI Open User Profile Configuration UI Search Username Select User Select ‘Edit’ Configure EX-33 Max Num of oLPNs : For testing purposes, value was set to 3. Repeat configurations for all users. Task Creation Rules Change oLPN Task creation Picking Task Parameters Open Task Creations Rules UI Select into Wave Task Criteria Select Rules names that will utilize RF Picking to Active Select Picking Task Parameters Tab Enable ‘Pick to tote?’ Select Pick Cart Plan: Pick Cart Plan – 3 totes . Select ‘Save Configuration’ Repeat for all task creation rules that will utilize EX33 RF Picking for Active. Change oLPN Task Creation Definition Open Task Creations Rules UI Select into Wave Task Criteria Select Rules names that will utilize RF Picking to Active Select Definition Tab Select ‘AID oLPN Number’ Configure Value to 1 . Zone Picking Transaction Parameters Open Transaction Parameters UI S earch RF P ack Pick Cart Transaction Select Edit. Select parm 5-5 and set to ‘Defines if static zone picking is used’ . Save. On the parameters tab, go to the last page of the parameters. Enable parameter 520-520 to enable custom zone picking screen. Save configuration. Wave Configuration Open Run waves UI Open Parameters Tab. Configure Static Zone Picking as seen below. Save Configuration. Location Gr ouping Open Location Grouping UI Configure all locations that will utilize Zone Picking in UI. Note: Only configured a few locations for testing. Each Group attribute is equivalent to a zone. Group attribute 1 = Zone 1. Repeat for all locations using zone picking. Once completed with each location. Save. EX33 Label Printing Configuration Transaction Parameters Open Transaction Parameters UI Search RF Pack Pick Cart Transaction Select Edit. Select parm 3-3 and set to ‘Print Shipping Label’. Save. On the parameters tab, go to the 2 nd page of the parameters. Select Edit. Select parm 61-61 and set to ‘ Batch Printing Disabled ’. Select parm 62-62 and set to ‘Do not print both labels’ . Select parm 526-526 and set to ‘Y es ’ Save. 8.2 Ensure CTRL-P Reprint Key is enabled on transaction Open Transaction Parameters UI Search RF Pack Pick Cart Transaction Select Edit. Ensure CTRL-KEY P is enabled to allow reprint functionality within EX33 flow. 8.3 Change Printer Requestor Open Change Print Requestor UI Select Print Requestor wanting to print from Save. EX33 Chase Wave Processing Attribute 3 (prevents oLPNs with open master tasks from getting chase waved) System Codes Open System codes UI and filter by code type "611". Select it and click on code IDs button. User brought to 611 code IDs. User adds EX33 Chase enablement to Wave Process Attribute 3 as below. Click save. Run Waves UI Open run waves UI. Select Standard Chase Wave Click on Standard Chase Wave’s parameters tab and scroll down to Processing Attributes. Enable Attribute 3 = "Enable EX33 Chase". Click Save Configuration. User runs regular chase process with attribute 3 enabled for EX33 Chasing. EX33 Labor Metrics Configuration System Codes Navigate to System Codes UI in WM. We will need to add Custom code C-A33 if it has not been added. Search for system code C- A33 : Type in A33 for Code Type. Click apply to search. If C-A33 does not exist, click on add. populate the fields with the information provided in the screenshot below. User clicks save. User validates system code C-A33 is created. Click on the Code ID's action button in the lower right of the menu. Click ADD action button. Populate the fields with the information provided in the screenshot above. Click SAVE. Click parameters tab action button in the lower right of the menu. Click ADD action button. populate the fields with the information provided in the screenshot below. Click Save Click on the Code ID's action button in the lower right of the menu. Click on the code ID’s parameter tab and enable byte 1-1 . Screenshot below provided.
